home.guessWhoTitle: Play "Guess who" and find your caricature!
home.guessWhoParagraph1:
If you visited our stand and had your portrait taken by our robot, now's the time to find your cartoon alter ego.
Play our "Guess Who," spot your caricature among the crowd, and download your digital twin.
home.guessWhoParagraph2: Note: there's a high chance you'll laugh when you see your own face in pixel-perfect form.
home.sectionImageAlt: Team collaboration - Woman and man working together on laptop

jobs.title:
Unlock your potential
and become an ERNIan.
jobs.description: We are looking for people like you, ready to grow and eager to take on challenging projects to go even further.

whoIsWho.title: Guess who
whoIsWho.possibleTwins: These are your possible digital twins!

questions.q1: Does anyone in your caricature wear glasses?
questions.q2: Does anyone in your caricature have a beard?
questions.q3: Does anyone in your caricature have long hair?
questions.q4: Does anyone in your caricature wear earrings?
questions.q5: Is there a man in the caricature?
questions.q6: Is there more than one person in the caricature?
questions.q7: Is there a pet in the caricature?

grid.noneFound: No caricatures were found with those features

label.title: Caricature labeling
label.shortcuts: Keys: 1-7 toggle features, A previous, D next, S save.
label.noFiles: There are no files to label.
